reviews.title: Scam
reviews.text: I book in agoda and its non refundable. When I arrived at the hotel one staff show me his phone and said no room available. Second reason no electricity and water so its life threatening to admit a guest. Its a scam. My advice do not come or book this hotel. Even you have it booked online but when you arrived the stuff of the hotel can not give you rooms for this reasons they gave. Its a total waste of money, time and effort.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Definitely dont recommend staying at this hotel, it is not a safe environment, staff are not friendly and very very bad for boutique hotel standards and not hygienic. Also room doesn’t look like the picture. You can stay in better places for the same prices or by paying a little more. I couldn’t sleep all night, unfortunately I don’t think there was housekeeping and there were dirty stuff from previous people. There was a lot of rubbish on the stairs and corridor.

reviews.title: Bad Bad
reviews.text: Scamming Hotel, we arrived late at night. There was no receptionist to be found at the hotel lobby. We sat down for 10 mins, then a dodgy guy with bike helmet showed up and asked if we wanted room. We told him that we had already booked through Agoda and showed him the booking. He told us to wait and he would be looking for the receptionist. 20 mins later the supposed receptionist showed up and asked us to pay first and then we obliged. Only then he told us we would need to go to their "second branch". Then told us to hopped on bikes with our luggages. Then drove us to another hotel called "Louis Hotel." Then he led us into a room but we complained that we booked 2 rooms instead of one. And we had to show him the booking again. He said he couldn't get us 2 rooms. Then finally we decided enough is enough and asked for money back. Only then we got 2 rooms but the rooms are not in good shapes, toilets have no lights and cant flush. AC's not working properly. Rooms are nasty and smelly with molds. Worst experience ever.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Since I arrived late, I was looking for a hotel just to sleep in. It was a classic case of "you get what you pay for." I'm used to budget accommodations and wasn't expecting service on par with Japanese hotels at all, but this place was still terrible. The door to the room didn’t fit properly, the bathroom door had a broken lock, there was only one bottle of water for two people, no tissues, and despite it saying breakfast was included, I was told it wasn’t being provided. The elevator was shaky and scary, and when I asked to pay with a card, I was clearly met with a displeased expression... I was disappointed because it was cheap, the pictures looked nice, and the reviews were good. I just accepted that I was there to sleep and spent the night.

reviews.text:
1- Not clean, moldy, and dusty, the one-way street is very inconvenient.

6- In general.. really..one should not stop and rest at this place.

reviews.title: Hotel  location & facility
reviews.text: Hotel location was not near to the location as described in Agoda many location need to take grab, the TV was not functioning and some basic item like mineral water was not provided. The hotel cleanliness was moderate only.

reviews.title: Massive disappointment
reviews.text: Aged furniture, dirty floor, housekeeping who never cleaned the toilet and staff who left the feeling that they are being forced to do their job

reviews.title: KS needs to improve.
reviews.text: The hotel room is beautiful, the facilities are good, and the price is cheap; however, the carpet in the bathroom was not clean, and when booking the hotel, it was confirmed that breakfast was included, but in reality, it was not served, which is not good and needs to be communicated to guests. There was no Wi-Fi password information in the room, and when checking in at 6 PM, the hallway lights were not on. The staff initially provided the wrong room according to the booking but later changed it to the correct one.

reviews.title: Not impressed
reviews.text:
We were not impressed with the Orange Hotel after staying at other hotels in Vietnam. The staff were definitely attentive, a little too much in that while we were trying to eat breakfast they would come over many times to start up conversations. We were upgraded without being told the first night then they needed to move us the second night, which was confusing. They do have a sister hotel in Hoi An which was helpful because we could use that as a point of reference. The Hoi An hotel set us up with a shuttle transfer that was cheap and quick back to Da Nang, but we're not sure why the Orange Hotel didn't know about it. Breakfast was okay, but the fried foods were always cold. The Vietnamese sandwiches were a favorite. 

I guess we mostly weren't impressed with Da Nang and would only recommed it as a place to travel through from the airport to Hoi An.

reviews.title: Read this
reviews.text: On arrival at 6.30pm we were told due to electric problems we had no room! Others have had this if you read other reviews . However, there was a room arranged '400m ' away. 2 trips on a motorbike to get us and bags there. We were taken to the worst hotel ever. We refused to stay there because shower had leaked across the floor, cigarette in the toilet, moisture running down the walls, dead cockroach, beds had been slept in. As we came out of the lift at ground floor 2 rats were going up the stairs. This 'hotel' has been closed since 2022 and now rents rooms by the hour so I leave you to decide what goes on there! After a 2 hour debate we were moved to another hotel 13km away! For one night only then in the morning got a taxi to the orange hotel ...which was ok. When we rejected the disgusting hotel, all we were offered was a refund. No good at 8.30pm!...avoid orange hotel in case you get sent elsewhere and waste a whole evening and the next morning ending up know here near where you planned to be! A total nightmare!

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Inexpensive,  but not very clean. Needs updating maybe some paint. Halways dirty, room floor not clean. Bathtub had mold around. Tv not working. I asked for another room, he gave me another, it was a little better but tv had no remote control 😒

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: When I arrived, there were still "short hair strands" from previous guests on the toilet that had not been cleaned. The room did not have a kettle and the refrigerator was no longer working. The hotel's location is on a road under construction, making it quite dusty and difficult to find a place to park the car. For one night, it was acceptable given the room rate.

reviews.title: The policy is very customer unfriendly
reviews.text:
This hotel is very customer unfriendly. I booked the hotel room for two nights but later I found that I made a mistake on my flight departure date and I only need one night. I contacted Agoda immediately (one week before my check in date) to explain but agoda told me twice that Orange hotel refused to help me. I understand that this is their policy but they could at least try to help me rent the room to someone else since it was one week before my check in date.

After I arrived, I tried to explain and negotiate. The manager,  said he can't change the policy and while I requested to talk to their boss, the boss never show up. Later, the lady at the front desk tried to contact Agoda and said that the problem is that Agoda may still charge Orange commission if Orange refund me. But their manager, came to stop her and started to yell at me and chanllenge me.

I understand that I made a careless mistake on booking initially. However, this hotel is very cold and customer unfriendly during the whole process. I would not recommend anyone to choose this hotel.

reviews.title: I will tell me story and let others judge
reviews.text:
- I saw the post of Orange Hotel with  the 8.4. it's price ~ 1.6 mil VND, discounted price was abt 500k VND, I booked and got ~ 1mil VND for 2 nights.
- when I got there, the receptionist greeted me with a unpleasant face, talking on phone with someone. I waited, and he talked to me after the call "this hotel is in power cut, we cannot let the guests to use elevator, hence you will not able to bring your luggages upstair + the street in front of our hotel is been fixing now, too noisy. May I send you to another hotel in the chain?" I know that they have another Orange hotel at another street, hence I agreed to move there
After I saw the name of the hotel to move, it's not Orange, but Louis Hotel, I asked the receptionist "why it's not Orange, if your hotel cannot provide me a room, why did you still receive my booking? why did not you tell me in advance but wait for me to come here then treat me this way?", he explained blah blah. I checked the price of that Louis hotel to see whether it's the same level with this Orange, as I would not accept to move to a worse one, but couldn't find the info, so I decided to move there to settle first, then maybe would look for another hotel. ah, he helped me to call a cab, and I had to pay the fee. it was not much, but they asked me to move there, it's not me to ask them to move me there, why did I have to take care the transportation fee? 
- When I reached there, I saw immediately the board to show the price of a room in that hotel, 350kVND only. I asked the receptionist of Louis, and he told me that I would collect ~1 mil VND from me, same as my booking info. I asked for the real price, he told me it cost 500kVND normally. What does it mean? the normal price, without discount, is only 500k vs. 1.6 mil VND of Orange, are these 2 hotels in the same level? the receptionist at Loius hotel seeing my anger, and talked to Orange hotel receptionist, and offer me a rate @400kVND/night
- I tried to look for another hotel to move but some hotels around was full or not having good reviews, hence I decided to stay there. but after, I could not stand the smell of the bathroom, hence, I stayed there 1 night then moved to another one near the beach, it was much much better.
It's quite a long story abt my issue with Orange hotel. Honestly, I cannot judge about their facilities or other services as I did not stay there, did not know what exactly how it looked like, that's why I just keep it at 3 in my review. But the way they arranged my accommodation made me feel bad. It's up to you to decide whether you would choose Orange hotel as a venue of your trip.

reviews.title: Okayish stay, staff was polite, worn out/ old condition
reviews.text: Staff was nicely spoken, very polite and cute. Rooms were kind worn out and old condition bathrooms and rooms. There were little red ants all over the bed, windows table (idk it’s kinda common in that area) . But location is so-so. Can get better near the airport accommodations or near my khe beach is best bet for other days. Can get better more modern more amenities properties at same or lesser price.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Booked a room with 2 beds, but received a small room with 1 bed, and there were many cockroaches in the room. The room was a bit dark and damp. Not worth the price paid, but the central location makes it easy to move around.

reviews.title: Do yourself a favor... skip it
reviews.text: We arrived late at night and requested a non-smoking room but upon entering, the room lingers the strong smell of cigarette. We though it just because we are near the fire exit and it will definitely fade away but it wasn't. The next night, the key on our door isn't working, even the maintenance have a hard time opening our door using the duplicate key. The moment the he opened it he just went away with hand signals thinking that he will came back but didn't.  We only stayed for two nights and during the day we are on our tour, only arrived during late night so we are already exhausted on our trip.  Comfortable and no hassle hotel room, it is the only thing that we are looking for but they failed big time on that.

reviews.response:

reviews.title: Night staff are clueless sorry

reviews.title: Good staff terrible rooms
reviews.text: The only good thing about this hotel was its staff and the artisan beer in their lobby fridge. It was cheap so I cannot expect much but dear lord the room was awful and so dirty I felt disgusted honestly, nothing like their photos. Location it's okay but there are works on the street.

reviews.title: Hard to enter
reviews.text: There’s a construction going on the entire street that’s why it’s hard to enter the building. You have to go to a muddy path (if it rains) before entering. The bed and towels were also dirty and the AC was very noisy. You can also hear the people outside since that walls are very thin. The room was spacious tho’ and the staff was friendly.

reviews.title: All fried stuff for breakfast
reviews.text:
Hotel is old, but clean and friendly staff.
Location is not convenient enough for travellers to walk around but grab is easy.
Breakfast is nightmare for us because all food are fried, very unhealthy and they provide only beef noodles apart from the fries stuffs.
If you want a good breakfast to start the day, you might want to look for somewhere else.
reviews.response:
Dear Ms Rong,
Thank you so much for taking your time to leave us a review. 

Those things you have mentioned on breakfast in the review are absolutely not our standard requirement. We take your concerns serious and will pass this review to our F&B team for a better and healthy menu.

In addition, thank you so much for your feedback on our hotel's condition. We are upgrading our hotel.

Thank you, it really was a pleasure to have taken care of you, and it is much appreciated that you have noted our care and attention. I will pass your kind words on to the staff on the level of service received .

Once again, I do apologize for any inconvenience cause during your stay and hope you allow us another chance to prove our improvement in the future.

Kind regards,
Orange Hotel Team

reviews.title: Value and decent hotel stah
reviews.text: The best impression I have is that the staff are really helpful. They gave tips on travelling in Da Nang, the local food to try etc. Appreciate on those useful tips to get us oriented in these few days in Da Nang. It suits more for travellers who out most of the time from the hotel as the facilities are very basic - no gym and pool but I feel the price is still value for money to stay. Keep it up!

reviews.title: Great staff
reviews.text:
Nice, new-ish hotel with very friendly and helpful staff. On the first morning I decided to sleep in and miss breakfast, which finishes at 9:30. At 9:40 the restaurant telephoned asking if I would like breakfast brought to my room. I asked for a fruit plate and coffee, which was delivered to my room at no extra cost!

On the 9th floor, where I stayed, you can hear breakfast being served on 10th floor, so I'd recommend staying on a lower floor. My double bedroom was clearly designed as a twin, with sockets and light switches in the middle of the wall, and so the double bed was pushed up towards the window. It was a little odd visually, but a very comfortable room. I'd definitely consider staying here again.

reviews.title: Wonderful staff
reviews.text: My friend and I stayed at this hotel for only one night, but all the staff members there were really friendly and kind. They were always happy to help us. Actually, I felt their hospitality is much better than the 4 star hotel we stayed in Hoi An. The room was a bit small but still had enough space to open out suitcase. Furthermore, they upgraded our room for free! :) I do not usually write feedback on hotels, but this hotel was very comfortable that I couldn't resist writing about it. No wonder why it has such a good review. Thank you very much again to all the staff members who made the stay in Da Nang fun! :)

reviews.title: Budget Friendly and Clean

Heavy construction so it could get loud throughout the day, but I didn't find it to be a deal breaker and would still stay again.

reviews.title: Pleasant stay at Orange Hotel
reviews.text: We were very happy with Orange Hotel. The service and facilities were really nice and clean and welcoming. The staff was most kind and helpful to us. The room was very nice with complimentary beer and water. The breakfast was huge, however, we came around 9am and it seemed as though some of the food had gone cold or dried out. I also wish they had a few more vegetarian options, but that is just being picky. Make sure to ask for the Orange Coffee Special!
reviews.response:
Dear Sybil , 
Thank you so very much for taking the time to review Orange Hotel .
I am so delighted that you had an enjoyable stay and would like to thank you for your review. It is such a tremendous compliment that our guests feel their stay was so worthy of feedback that they go ahead and share their experience , and it is so very greatly appreciated.

It was such a pleasure to have you staying with us and I am thrilled that you enjoyed the hotels services and facilities as well as departed with fond memories of your time here. All staff shall also be thrilled to read your review and I shall take pleasure in passing it on to them. 

 I do thank you for your feedback about breakfast . We will share this to F&B team to improve quality .  I do hope to welcome you back to Orange in the near future.

Warm regards, 

Orange Team

reviews.title: Overall very good hotel to stay in Danang.
reviews.text:
Service team members- 10/10
Location 10/10
Room and decor 5/10. The furnishings could be less bulky as they took up most of the room space.  One side of bed was right up against the window almost. The walls are extremely thin as could hear next room talking and moving around.
Breakfast 10/10.  The best breakfast I've had in a 3 star hotel so far. Great selection of nice tradition Vietnamese food and some western.  Would stay here again for the breakfast and service.
reviews.response:
Dear Angeline ,

reviews.title: Service was excellent.
reviews.text:
We had our room upgraded upon arrival. I had an upset stomach and the owner brought me Kings Tea and ginger tea to help. It worked a treat. We were able to walk to the Han river and it was very safe and beautiful at night. If in DaNang again we will stay here.
Beautiful staff, service is excellent.

reviews.title: Nice small hotel in Danang
reviews.text: Good location. Friendly staff. Clean rooms. Nice breakfast with a lot of choice. We were in Danang after "evacuating ourselves" from Hoi an following a flood. Danang has NO charm but Orange Hotel makes it palateable. We are world trekkers and would recommend this hotel.

reviews.title: Great location and staff was friendly and helpful
reviews.text: We stayed one night in July 2016. The staff was great because they were waiting for us and check in was fast. This is unlike other hotels who need to waste a lot of time looking for your reservation. They also provide a welcome drink and complimentary beer in the room. It is hard to say something bad about the Orange Hotel so just stay there and you'll see.

reviews.title: hotel staffs
reviews.text: Very friendly staff and english spoken no problem communication.

reviews.title: Friendly Staff and Good Location
reviews.text: booked the standard room with no window, get upgraded with additional 5 dollars. Staff here are very friendly and willing to help. They gave gifts to some customers for some reason but we did not get one.

reviews.title: It is good for a short stay because staff good
reviews.text: relax and comfortable

reviews.title: Comfortable stay
reviews.positives: Courteous staff, good location and comfortable rooms

reviews.title: picked on staff performance alone, did not disappo
reviews.text:
What everyone said before me is 100% correct. From the moment you step foot onto the pavement in front of the hotel you are greeted and welcomed like you are part of the hotel family - this is obviously part of the hotel's ethos. 

The room standard was second to none, beds comfortable and air-con working great (this is a big deal in South East Asia!!!). Great range at breakfast although both days the plates weren't really stocked up even at a reasonable time which is perhaps something the hotel can fix.

The front desk manager was extremely helpful in recommending places of interests and also for a friendly chat which adds to the experience. Also had the privilege of meeting Mr. Nam who was the hotel owner and to no surprise he also was completely curteuous and very warm to greet.

Overall, a highly recommended hotel if it is in your price range (as there are other lesser hotels - only just - for a big step down in price).
reviews.positives: warm hospitality, staff knowledge and comfort of room & hotel in general

reviews.title: Cozy hotel with friendly and helpful staff
reviews.text: The experience was a great surprise to me! Although I stayed in a standard room without window, I still found it cozy. First, they offered 2 bottles of complimentary beer everyday which is a very nice treat in this hot weather! Second, the staff was very enthusiastic, helpful and friendly. They are very willing to show us the great places and nice restaurants. Because of this, we went to a very local seafood restaurant and had a great meal! Third, the manager of hotel was super friendly to his customers.  He sat down and talked with the room guests every morning during the breakfast! I was very impressed and knew more about Vietnam via the conversation! If I come to Da Nang again, definitely I'll come again and I highly recommend orange hotel!
reviews.positives: Great location, Nice and helpful staff, free complimentary beer everyday

reviews.title: Simple, clean and excellent staff services
reviews.text: Have a great stay in the hotel and enjoy the city, thanks to the staff recommendation.
reviews.positives: The 3 great things about this hotel are Great breakfast, free wifi and excellent staff. Special thanks to cam, xoan, nga, vi and mimi nguyen

reviews.title: New hotel, very attentive staff
reviews.text: We stayed here for one night so did not see much of Danang. The staff recommended seeing the Dragon bridge at 9 pm so we walked down and purchased tickets for a boat ride which went under three beautifully lighted bridges and stopped in front of the dragon bridge. At 9 PM fire came from its mouth and then bursts of water to drown the sparks. Quite the spectacle and happy we did not miss it! Walking back to our hotel was a little scary as not much was open. If I had been alone, would have grabbed a cab. All in all, a great stay but too short to give much of a review. The breakfast was a la cart but would have been better if they offered a pork or beef Pho and fruite, coffee, juices, bread rolls or pastries and cheeses. Quicker and would have been enough.

reviews.title: Great & Friendly Service
reviews.text:
From the moment of arrival at the Hotel, you felt that this is a very different hotel from the rest. The bellhop was at the side of our taxi eagerly waiting to help you unliaded. Were greeted by a friendly staff of receptionists and GRO, coupled with hot towel and cups of tea to smoothen the processing if the check in.  Breakfast was good considering what other hotel in the region would offer.  If you are out of idea what to see where to go, just talk to the ever friendly GRO, she will be able to offer you some great tips.

On departure, the owner would be present to bade you farewell making the entire stay in Orange Hotel the best ever in my visits to DaNang
reviews.positives: Very Friendly, Personalize and Fantastic Service

reviews.title: Very kind and clean room
reviews.text: all employees are very kind. The room is very clean. Air port is close from it.
reviews.positives: all employees are very kind. The room is very clean. Air port is close from it.

reviews.title: Short but sweet
reviews.text: Stayed for a night before moving on to Hoi An. Truly lived up to its high ratings on both Agoda and TA. Friendliest staff I have ever come across in the region. Room was clean and comfy.

reviews.title: Good experience
reviews.text: The hotel is affordable and good value of the price, near han market,

reviews.title: When booking through Agoda, it showed that breakfast was included, but the hotel does not provide breakfast. I have contacted Agoda multiple times with no response.
reviews.text: On the second day, I forgot to leave a tip when I went out in the morning. I would give the room cleaning a score of one. On the third day, I left a tip, but no one came to clean the room. By the fourth and fifth days, I simply didn't leave a tip, yet someone came to clean the room. The room cleaning probably wouldn't take more than 3 minutes.

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.title: Excellent Customer Service
reviews.text: Customer service is the name of the game here - the staff were all delightful, especially the lovely girl on the front desk both days of our stay here. She helped us discover key areas of the city, booked our transportation to Hoi An with a side stop at the Lady Buddha temple, and even printed out text of how to communicate an allergy to fish in Vietnamese.  The owner greeted us at breakfast and chatted with us about his interest in Canada as well - lovely man who clearly enjoys getting to know his customers.  The neighbourhood is a short walk away (10 min) from the riverside bars and restaurants as well as the Dragon Bridge, making it a bit quieter at night.
reviews.response:

Orange Team

reviews.title: Great breakfast, friendly staff
reviews.text: A comfortable stay. Staff very friendly and helpful. Excellent breakfast spread with a lot of variety. Something for everyone. Very clean and comfortable room. Would like to have stayed longer!

reviews.title: Good food, friendly staff
reviews.text: Although our stay at the Orange hotel was short, we were made to feel at home by the staff who couldn't be more helpful. The breakfast was especially good, with a lot of variety. Would certainly use it again if we return.

The staff were really eager to help you for everything. Breakfast was good as well. Given reasonable price, convenient location and excellent staff, I recommend this hotel.

reviews.title: Great service. Value for money
reviews.text:
Orange Hotel is located at the center of the city, and the staff are all very helpful and friendly. They provided good and considerate advice for our trip. The hotel offers cars to send you to major attractions, with reasonable price. The room service was also fast and decent. During breakfast, there were a wide variety of choices, and a lady from the hotel would mingle with you to ask about your feedback of the hotel and to offer travel advise. When we went to Ba Na hill, the receptionist kindly advised me to wear more, which turns out to be absolutely helpful since it was cold up on the hill.

We had a very nice experience staying in Orange Hotel and we would definitely recommend it to anyone else.

reviews.title: Central location, near many dining options.
reviews.text: The hotel is not new, the elevator is slow and often makes strange noises while moving, but fortunately it still operates safely while I was there. The room has no windows, is stuffy, and the furniture is old. The location is convenient for dining, close to many vegetarian restaurants, but not near the beach.

reviews.title: Good clean room in a very good location

Even with few clients they made breakfast a full buffet and also offered a la carte items. There was a bit of a problem with the hot water the first but that was fixed as soon as I asked.  I think I may not have turned on the switch for the hot water heater, but the staff made it all work.

reviews.text: Everything was ok and fine. The hotel has 5 star service. The staff are courteous, friendly and helpful. The rooms are cleaned. The coffee house is on the top floor. City View while having breakfast. Its worth the money.

reviews.title: Orange hotel Very satisfied
reviews.text: We were very happy with our 4 night stay at Orange hotel.  The hotel is clean, safe, and the staff attended to our every need.  The breakfast served in the morning was varied and plentiful.  We had the pleasure of meeting and visiting with the owner who turned out to be a very caring and customer focused man.  Again a very positive experience at the Orange Hotel.  I would definitely stay there again.

reviews.title: Good service and great value for money
reviews.text: We love the Orange Hotel. The hotel is nice and clean. It costs us USD 5 (or VND 150K) to go from the airport to the hotel by taxi. Staff are extremely helpful and friendly. Buffet breakfast is nice and tasty, with enough choices.
reviews.positives: friendly and helpful staff, centrally located, nice breakfast

reviews.title: Amazing staff, brand new hotel
reviews.text: Within a few minutes we realised this is a very special hotel, and throughout our stay we were not disappointed. The hotel is just 4 months old, and the staff were charming. Clearly very high standards were applied to the building and everything worked perfectly. This and and the staff put many much more expensive hotels to shame. The only slight quibbles we could think of was that some of the breakfast items (e.g. pancakes) would have been better served hot, also the location is in a rather non-descript area, although much of Da Nang is like that. Overall a very memorable experience, and extremely good value for money.
reviews.positives: The attitude, English, and knowledge of the staff

reviews.title: Great experience
reviews.text:
Wonderful hotel. The room was very nice, clean, comfortable, and felt very cozy. The hotel itself is located within a short walk from the Han River promenade, the Dragon Bridge, as well as numerous eating/drinking options. The buffet breakfast was ample and filling for this price range, and the guest relationship officer, a young lady called Thu, went around the tables making sure the guests are happy with their stay. 

As nice as the hotel was, it was the staff that made all the difference. The staff were superbly friendly and helpful and spoke English. One of them came running after me with an umbrella when she noticed it had started to drizzle. Such attention to detail and welfare of their customers is truly rare for a hotel at any price range. So impressed was I with the staff that I booked a room with their sister hotel(Nhi Nhi Hotel) in Hoi An hoping to get equally good service.

One of the best hotels in this price range I have ever stayed in any part of the world.

reviews.title: Ease and comfort
reviews.text: The staff went out of their way to be helpful both in the hotel and by providing car service to tourist sites and the airport.We loved the fruit and local wine waiting for us upon arrival. Our room with large windows and French doors leading to a spacious rooftop balcony gave us great views of DaNang. The neighborhood is safe and welcoming to foreign travelers and offers numerous coffee houses and restaurants. It is a quick walk to the river,local market, Cham Museum and Buddhist Temples.
reviews.positives: the staff, great breakfast choices, lovely rom

reviews.title: Live like a prince, pay like a backpacker.
reviews.text: We passed through Da Nang whilst visiting Hoi An, staying only 1 night and didn't eat at the in-house restaurant (but I'm sure it would be good, this is Vietnam after all!). The staff fell over themselves to make us comfortable - iced tea and cold hand towels at the door - helped us with flight confirmation and packing and labelling a large box full of lanterns we were taking home. As we were leaving early in the morning, they also made up a take-away breakfast for us and gave us a free airport transfer. The room itself was splendid, everything works well and the shower was fantastic - heaps of pressure and hot water. We highly recommend Orange Hotel.
reviews.positives: Great try-harder staff, convenient location, clean, new facilities.

reviews.title: Excellent value.
reviews.text:
A little outside the main area, but elreasonavly close. 10 minutes from Deagon Bridge. 

Very clean, housekeeping every day. 

Proper bathroom with bathtub, nice! 

TV didn’t seem to work, but no issue with this. 

Large but quiet hotel. Would definitely stay here again.

reviews.title: I love this place!

reviews.title: Still the best I have stayed at for the money!!!!
reviews.text: I stayed here a few years ago when they first opened. I thought I would try it again to see if there were still just as great as back then. The hotel still looks new, and the staff is even better than before. These folks are the best, and will be at your beckon call at anytime too the day. What a joy it is to stay at such a wonderful place. I have stayed at hotels that cost 8 times more, but none could match Orange Hotel

reviews.title: Orange Hotel staff rock
reviews.text: Orange Hotel facilities and staff are outstanding and l have nothing but praise for all the Orange Hotel staff.  Their helpfulness, assistance and genuineness was a highlight of my stay in Da Nang.  As much as l would have like to given its location top points, regretfully its location is not in the centre of the tourists precedent. However it is only a few blocks from the river and very walkable or about 10000 dong by taxi after a few quite drinks.  Worthwhile mentioning is the staff arrange a taxi to take me to various locations of my choice and had the driver wait for me. The approximate cost was discussed and the outcome was the drive went were l wanted without guidance and charged slightly less than anticipated thanks to the directions provided by the Orange Hotel staff. I will definitely recommend Orange Hotel to all and most definitely choose this hotel when l return on my next visit.

reviews.title: Great staffs!

reviews.title: Best service ever!
reviews.text: I heard this hotel's services are REALLY good. When I got this hotel, time was over the midnight, but all staffs gave me big welcoming and warm hospitality. I had stayed 2 days in this hotel, I don't feel any uncomfortables and tiny problems. Their breakfast are really good. when you are standing few minutes infront of some dishes they came to you and explained about the dishes and let you know how to eat. Staff's serives can't be better. That services is one of the best hotel service in my life. I really want to say, Appreciate every service they provide to me. I definitely stay again, when I have chance to visit Da Nang. They left awesome memories to me in Danang, Vietnam.

reviews.title: Wow, i love Orange hotel
reviews.text: The staff here is so awesome, Swan, thank you!  I hope they tell you about this, you deserve it!  Greeted with cold towel and drink, welcome sign in the hotel as well, they give you two free waters and beers in your rooms.  Room is modern, good bed, great shower, wifi was awesome everywhere.  Breakfast is up on the higher floors of the building, awesome views from here, and you can order anything on menu, they are very attentive to you and really care about your experience, cant say enough about that.  They even see you to your leaving cab or van to make sure everything goes well from start to finish.  I would always stay here if I am back in Da Nang.  Oh yeh, airport is 10 min cab, river is 10 min walk, beach 10 min cab, lots of food and places like that walking distance.

reviews.title: great hotel, wonderful helpful staff

reviews.title: The best hotel we stay at in Vietnam
reviews.text: Everything about the hotel was excellent.The staff couldn't have been more helpful. We had a very early plane to catch and they served us breakfast earlier than normal hours.  The room was modern and very clean and the beds and linen were immaculate.  It was the best hotel that we stayed in in Vietnam.  It was a pity that we stayed only one night.
reviews.positives: service, high standards, close to airport

reviews.title: Home away from home! Really pampered
reviews.text: Fantastic beyond description! Friendly and helpful staff who stop at nothing to make you feel welcomed. Room was new, clean, and comfortable. Really value for money.

reviews.title: wonderful staff, top quality rooms
reviews.text: We have stayed in many moderately priced hotels in Viet Nam (we worked there for six months in 2011) but without any doubt this was the very best one. Luu, the manager, studied hotel management in the US and he has applied his knowledge to create a real quality experience. Da Nang is well located for a number of excursions and this is a great hotel to use as a base. It gets our most enthusiastic recommendation.
reviews.positives: Welcoming atmosphere,  quality rooms, modern amenities

reviews.title: THE BEST 3 STAR HOTEL IN VIETNAM.
reviews.text: I have stayed in many 2, 3 and 4 Star hotels in Vietnam. This is the best hotel I have ever stayed in. If you want a 4 star hotel for the price of a 3 star this it it. The staff were so helpful it was almost embarrasing. For example when I sat down at their internet computer they brought me a glass of cold water and a cold towel. They spoke English well and remembered your name. Breakfast for Westerners was 8/10 which is pretty good for Vietnam. Stay here and you will be impressed!

reviews.title: Great experience for group travel.
reviews.text: Our group stayed here for 3 days and we are very pleased. The hotel is located near many dining options, making it convenient to get around. The rooms are clean, tidy, the air conditioning is cool, and the beds are comfortable, so everyone slept well. The staff is friendly and warmly responds to any questions. The price is reasonable for the quality. If we have the opportunity to travel again, our group will choose this hotel again.

reviews.title: The hotel is located in the center of Da Nang, very convenient for moving around.

The rooms, while simply designed, are extremely clean, tidy, and fully equipped with amenities like air conditioning, a refrigerator, a hairdryer, etc. With very reasonable prices and a very convenient location, this is definitely a worthwhile choice every time I come to Da Nang! Highly recommended!

It is definitely worth choosing if you are looking for a convenient, clean, and good service accommodation in Da Nang!

All the people from the hotel are so nice and friendly and always do there very best to take care about you. It actually feels more like staying with friends.

I have stayed in so many hotels over the years but I cannot remember another hotel with such great employees.

So I absolutely recommend this hotel if you going to stay in Da Nang.

We chose the hotel for an overnight stop before a flight, as it was a short drive from the airport, but just a short walk from the river for an evening stroll and dinner.  I wish we could have stayed longer.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
As always Orange hotel is the best. I have stayed here many times, from when they first opened until the present. Do not know how they do it but the staff is always the best. One would think you would find a bad apple in the bunch that did not treat the guest like royalty. But from the moment you arrive streetside until your transplantation takes you away they are there just being the greatest. Most hotels look a little worn and tattered in no time  in Vietnam. Not at the Orange Hotel... the factories do not look much different than the day they opened. 
   I have always been curious what their children’s names were. I am sure one of them must be named Juice. Mr. Cam the owner means Orange in Vietnamese and his wife’s Vietnamese name mean “ Fresh” . Only stands to reason the family would stay with the fruit theme “ Fresh , Orange, Juice”!!!! Keep up the great work guys. And keep the lights on for my return.
reviews.response: Dear Mr Timmy, It was such a pleasure to have you staying with us and I am thrilled to read of what an enjoyable stay you have had. I am delighted that you thoroughly enjoyed every aspect of your stay with us. It gives me great pleasure to read your kind words on our friendly and attentive staff across the hotel. Your kind comments are much appreciated and shall be passed on to my team. The service we provide really is a genuine pleasure for us though naturally it is reassuring and very encouraging to receive such feedback. I very much hope to welcome you back to the Orange Hotel in the near future and would like to thank you for taking the time to review the hotel . Warm regards, Orange Team

reviews.title: Amazing!!!
reviews.text: This was my second stay at Orange Hotel and it remains my absolute favorite hotel in Da Nang. The staff are so wonderful! My brother became sick and while I was out of the hotel, they brought rice porridge and ginger tea to his room. They also accommodated a late check out for him since he was too ill to travel. Thank you so much for another wonderful stay at Orange Hotel!!!!

Free water is expected, but free beer as well is great! WE were cycling and they very kindly asked us if we would like to take anything extra from breakfast to help us cycle. Great approach. reviews.title: Faboulous staff in great hotel
reviews.text: The hotel is new, well kept , with the lift. There is a wonderful large  panoramic roof-top room for breakfast, with the best ever choice we had in out trip through Vietnam: hot and cold, sweet and savoury, plenty of fruits and all you could wish for. Our room was  immaculately clean, with a very nice large modern shower. Our room wasn't very large but was comfortable (we only laked room to place our suitcases, so we left them on the ground. Really the only thing that could have been better, but there must be larger rooms). The staff deserves to be mentionned, as it has been extremely nice and helpful all the time, talking to the taxi driver to be sure he understood where he had to go, and trying to be helpful in every way they could.

reviews.title: The Best Possible Stay
reviews.text: This hotel was one of the most comfortable, clean, and friendly hotels in which my husband and I have stayed in our travels throughout Asia. The room was immaculately clean, the bed was "just right" for anyone with back issues, and the bathroom spotless. The shower always had hot water and didn't "cycle" hot and cold as some do. The staff was more than professional and friendly, always inquiring about our needs, making helpful suggestions for sights and shopping, and smoothing the way for us throughout our stay. We felt part of the "Orange Hotel family" and will stay there again without a doubt. We hope others have the same experience although we would like to keep this our "secret" spot!
reviews.positives: Professionalism of the staff, comfort and cleanliness of the room, ever hanging breakfast choices

reviews.title: Best Hotel in Danang
reviews.text: From the minute you walk in, the staff makes you feel very welcomed. During check in, they asked me to sit down at the sofa while they process my check in. During that time, they gave me a map the surrounding area and some places of interest nearby. I was also provided with complimentary   drink and cold towel.  The receptionist then came to us and gave us the room key and explained some stuffs. That was great as we did not have to stand at the counter awkwardly while the staff process out check in. The staff was genuine and did not push to sell tour packages available at the hotel. The rooms were clean and big. Bed was very comfortable but the point I would like to highlight would be the excellent service. The staffs were friendly and helpful. Everyone was so willing to recommend places to visit in Danang, even the restaurant staff. Even when I return to the hotel after a long day, the receptionist would give out cold towels which were very welcoming since the weather outside was so hot. They will also take the effort to ask how my day was and the places we had visited.  All these added the personal touch that is absent in many 4 or even 5 star hotels. It is this kind of people working at this hotel that have really made the hotel a great place to stay. I do hope that they will be able to keep up their customer service.

reviews.title: Impressive and totally enjoyable
reviews.text: It was a throroughly enjoyable stay.  The hotel is reasonably new, clean, and comfortable, and its facilities are all in the best of condition.  The personnel - owner, sales manager, receptionists, restaurant staff, and van drivers - were all very friendly and respectful, which provided a very positive human element to the stay; they enjoyed engaging me (and other customers) in conversation and seemed genuinely interested in whatever was being discussed.  The restaurant offered a variety of tasty dishes and drinks (including the Vietnamese style of coffee with condensed milk), and has some good views of the city.  Orange is a hotel which can be highly recommended for travellers wanting to stay in central Da Nang.
reviews.positives: The staff (in the lobby, in the restaurant, in the office, and in the vehicle); the room; and the restaurant

reviews.title: First-class experience
reviews.text: It was an excellent stay.  The room was very comfortable, clean, and well maintained; the staff were extremely friendly and helpful; and the meals and coffee in the restaurant were first-class.  The views of the city from the restaurant windows are also very good.  I would absolutely recommend Orange Hotel to travellers in Da Nang.
reviews.positives: The personnel (owner, sales manager, receptionists, restaurant staff, drivers); the room; the food.

reviews.title: The best hotel ever
reviews.text: I asked the sales team to arrange transportation or guided tours.   Their informative and prompt reply was tailor made. The price was very reasonable. The hotel was opened only half a year ago. The rooms were tastefully decorated. So don't be fooled by the simple look of the lobby.
reviews.positives: Staff gave you true hospitality. They would see to your every need. I talked to people from London. We all agreed that the service was ridiculously good.

reviews.title: This hotel is simply outstanding!!!
reviews.text: When I stayed at the Orange Hotel it was my very best experience of Vietnam.  I have stayed at the Shertaton and the Hyatt and the service and staff are exceptional.  This hotel was the best customer service I have ever stayed at, equalling the Sheraton and the hyatt!  The owner has a fantastic sense of humour and makes you feel at ease immediately.  I honestly could not recommend this hotel more highly and literally tell everyone I meet how good it was! Thank you so much for making my stay in Vietnam a most truly enjoyable experience!!!!

reviews.title: Superb
reviews.text: This has to be one of the best hotels we stayed during our 1 month holiday around Vietnam & Cambodia.  The rooms were spotless and a great breakfast was available in a dining room on top floor with views of the city.  However, the one thing that stood out was how friendly and very helpful the staff were - thank you for making our stay memorable.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: The Orange Hotel is a great place to stay with a prime location in Da Nang close to the major attractions and the air port The staff are very friendly and efficient. The breakfast buffet is excellent. The only thing I disliked about my room was the transparent glass door in the bathroom right in front of the toilet. Who in their right mind would design such a bathroom door?
reviews.positives: Central location, nice room, computer terminal in room with Internet access

reviews.title: Inspirational and exceptional
reviews.text: When you bear in mind there are resort hotels in Da Nang charging up to $1,000 per night this seemed incredible when we secured a room for $50. How could they compete? Well, they DO! Price does not reflect in the quality and service what-so-ever and this hotel's got everything. We were lucky enough to meet the whole family and heard stories of inspiration from the father who started his career as a motor-cycle repair shop and worked every hour available to build up his "empire". His son works his socks off to make sure everyone is beyond happy. It simply is remarkable, inspirational and exceptional. Don't hesitate. You'll love it.
